displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Way of the Jedi
synopsis: ===Back cover text=== Have you ever wanted to be a Jedi Knight? Well, here's your chance. From the chambers of the Jedi Temple you can travel to the forests of Kashyyyk and fight alongside the mighty Wookiees, or you can fly through space and battle bounty hunters in your starfighter. With dozens of paths to choose from, and over twenty-five different endings, there will be a whole new adventure waiting for you with every read.
title: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Way of the Jedi
